implemented_changes.change: Extended exact-name, payload-gated missing-unit inference for count, safety, complaint, enforcement, workforce, money, percentage, scale, safety-rate, and ridership metric names.
guards: Rules apply only when the record has a finite numeric value and no existing unit or unit_normalized.
Money metrics still require dollar/USD/currency evidence.
Percentage metrics still require percent evidence.
Complaint metrics still require count-shaped evidence rather than percent-only rows.
workforce_change requires employee/workforce wording to avoid percent-change rows.
Ambiguous train_derailments/train_collisions, crash_injuries, broad ridership, and Secondary Screening Score rows remain intentionally unresolved.

remaining.next_lane: Read-only Codex subagent Pauli (019f2062-a18c-7182-ad41-3459034caf3a) is auditing the remaining 586 rows for the next safe exact-name batch.
